title: Hardcoded Ethereum mainnet counterparties can misroute the prefund on the wrong chain
reason: The task manifest explicitly targets Ethereum mainnet, so this depends on operator misdeployment outside the intended environment rather than an in-scope contract flaw.

title: Unlimited AAVE approval to `TARGET` lets that external contract drain verifier-held rewards
reason: The approval exists, but the verifier does not hold substantial AAVE while `TARGET` can use it in the shown flow, and the successful path immediately liquidates withdrawn AAVE; realistic drain impact beyond residual dust is too speculative.

title: Counter state is fully permissionless and can be arbitrarily rewritten by any account
reason: `Counter.sol` is a standalone toy contract with no demonstrated role in protocol funds, permissions, or critical state, so unrestricted setters are not a reportable vulnerability here.
